description: Style Note Have a blast on the field, or when you're out on an everyday jog, with these comfortable shoes from gas. These shoes come with cool urban styling and a comfortable structure, and are worth adding to your wardrobe as they're also a perfect casual option when teamed with jeans and tees. Product Details White shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and perforations A padded tongue and inner Tough rubber outsole Thick TPU outsole with herringbone grooves Material and Care Synthetic and suede Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
